title: Fix Docker port mismatch + add OLLAMA_HOST + data volume
description: CRITICAL: docker-compose.yml exposes port 3000 but bin/agentic-service.js defaults to 1234. Fix: (1) Change docker-compose.yml port mapping to 1234:1234, (2) Add OLLAMA_HOST=http://host.docker.internal:11434 env var, (3) Add ./data:/app/data volume mount. Also fix ARCHITECTURE.md install section port references from 3000 to 1234.
